title: Keyset
description: A vanilla-friendly keybind profile and conflict resolver mod for Minecraft.
body:
Keyset

Profiles for every way you play.


Modrinth · Releases · Changelog · Developer Docs · Translations
---
Stop rebuilding your controls every time your playstyle changes.
Keyset saves your keybind layouts as profiles — PvP, building, creative, tech modpack, whatever —
and lets you switch between them instantly, from inside the game.
--- ## ✨ Features 🗂️  **Profiles** — Create as many named keybind layouts as you want. Switch with one click or automatically on server join. 🔍  **Live Conflict Detection** — Live scan of every clashing bind in your current layout. Fix them one by one or in bulk. Vanilla binds are never touched without you asking. 🔄  **Auto-Switch** — Set rules like `hypixel.net → PvP` and Keyset handles the switch the moment you connect. Works with partial server address matching. 🔗  **Share Codes** — Export any profile as an 8-character code. Send it to a friend, paste it in Discord, import it in seconds. Codes expire after 90 days. No account needed. 💾  **Save Live** — Made changes in vanilla Controls? Hit Save Live to capture exactly what's bound right now into the selected profile. 🎓  **Interactive Tutorial** — First-run guide that walks you through every feature with real tasks. Relaunch it any time from the `?` button. 🎨  **Polished UI** — Custom-themed interface with animations, contextual darkening, and a clean tab layout. No additional libraries required! --- ## 🚀 Getting Started 1. Open **Controls** and click **Keyset**. 2. On first launch, follow the interactive tutorial — it takes about two minutes. 3. Create a profile, click **Save Live** to capture your current binds, then **Activate**. 4. Open the **Conflicts** tab to clean up any overlapping keys. 5. Use **Auto-Switch** to set server rules. Use **Share** to export or import layouts. --- ## 🧩 Supported Versions | Minecraft | Fabric | Forge | NeoForge | | ---------------- | :----: | :---: | :------: | | 1.20.1 – 1.20.2 | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | 1.20.3 – 1.20.6 | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | 1.21.1 | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | 1.21.2 – 1.21.11 | ✅ | ❌ | ✅ | | 26.1.x | ✅ | ❌ | ✅ | > Quilt uses the Fabric jar. Forge support ends at 1.21.1. --- ## 🔒 Privacy Profiles are stored **locally** at `config/keybindprofiles.json`. Keyset collects no analytics and sends no telemetry. The **Share** feature uploads your profile data to `share.beeboyd.com` only when you explicitly click **Share**. Shared profiles are anonymous, stored for 90 days, and automatically deleted. Nothing is uploaded without your action. --- ## 🌍 Translations
